query_normalized: transferability of dft‑d3 dispersion to ionic liquids chemistry
rationale: The paper provides an empirical‑population study of ionic liquids (1,3‑dimethylimidazolium chloride), satisfying criterion (e): it investigates the same chemical system that the question concerns, even though it does not directly address DFT‑D3 dispersion. This makes it a relevant background reference for a literature review on the transferability of dispersion corrections to ionic‑liquid chemistry.
